name: Sweet and Sour Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cooked chicken breasts, cut into pieces
1 package Top Ramen noodles (do not cook or use)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add lettuce, green onions, and noodles to the cooked chicken.
2. Toast the sesame seeds and almonds for 10 minutes at 350 degrees.
3. Mix the ingredients for the dressing.
4. Add the toasted sesame seeds and almonds and toss with the dressing.
5. Refrigerate for 1 hour before serving.
